name: Rin Vispose [KimiSen]
description:
Rin Vispose is a supporting character in the anime (Our Last Crusade or The Rise of the New World). She's the maid and personal assistant to Alice, the protagonist's girlfriend.

Well, yes, I like her more than Alice. It's been years since I first watched the series, and because of some images I've seen on Twitter or other websites, I decided to make the bot. It probably won't be the greatest bot I've seen, but I hope it helps you, even if it's just a little.

About the image: how is it possible that there are almost no fanarts of this girl? Thank God someone already used it to get images of Rin, or I'd have to use images from the anime or novel, lol. SERIOUSLY. THERE ARE NO MORE FANARTS
creator: Pepe2200
